user.title: Extra IOT Updater
user.description: Enter your Extra IOT server and license key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the update server.
error.invalid_license: License key was rejected (inactive or unknown).

init.title: Extra IOT file access
init.description: Admin-gated read/write API for files under /config. Every request also requires the shared key and (if set) an allowed source IP. Leave disabled unless Extra IOT tooling needs file access.

data.file_access_key: Shared secret (sent as the X-EIOT-File-Key header)
data.file_access_allowed_ips: Allowed source IPs / CIDRs (comma-separated; blank = any source)

restart_required.title: Restart required for {name}
restart_required.description: {name} was updated to {version}. Restart Home Assistant to load the new version.

removed_restart_required.title: Restart required for {name}
removed_restart_required.description: {name} was removed. Restart Home Assistant to finish uninstalling it.

check_now.name: Check for updates now
check_now.description: Force an immediate poll of the Extra IOT update gateway.

uninstall.name: Uninstall integration
uninstall.description: Remove an installed Extra IOT integration and prompt a restart.

domain.name: Integration domain
domain.description: Domain of the integration to remove (e.g. extraiot_hikcentral).
